movie.title: Sufiyum Sujatayum (2020) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Malayalam] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDrive
movie.synopsis: Sufiyum Sujathayum is a unique love story, that revolves around Rajeev and Sujatha, a married couple who flies to Dubai to attend the last rites of Sujatha’s ex-lover, a Sufi priest. Aditi Rao Hydari essays the titular character Sujatha in the movie, which features Jayasurya in the role of her husband Rajeev.
